overview_description.suggested_question: Provide an overview of what happened, including timeline and impact (what was down/how many X impacted).

resolution_steps.suggested_question: Describe the steps taken to resolve the issue.

troubleshooting_steps.suggested_question: Describe any other troubleshooting steps you went through that will be helpful for support & customer to have a record of in the future.

primary_cause.suggested_question: State the root cause of the issue that occurred and how you came to that conclusion.

actions.suggested_question: List any HashiCorp follow-up actions to prevent issue from occurring again, items such as bug reports / research we said we'd do / etc.

List contributing factors that led to this incident for the customer to correct or avoid and any customer follow-up actions to prevent issue from occurring again, items they committed to, such as upgrading / etc.
